category_sources: Official xxHash site and GitHub README describe xxHash as a fast non-cryptographic hash algorithm.
source_facts.description: Extremely fast non-cryptographic hash algorithm.
display_name_sources: Official repository and website use xxHash capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the algorithm family, library, and command-line tools.
source_facts.homepage is the official xxHash website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a non-cryptographic hash algorithm.
source_facts.executables lists xxh32sum, xxh64sum, xxh128sum, xxh3sum, and xxhsum checksum tools.
